description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a deploy stage containing a pages job that runs only on the master branch. The job sets the variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to normal and executes the exact script commands: mkdir .public, cp -r * .public, mv .public/org-reveal_Readme.html .public/elisp/org-reveal/Readme.html, cp -r .public/reveal.js .public/elisp/org-reveal/, and mv .public public. It then publishes the public/ directory as an artifact. Use the default Docker image and no additional services.
